mapper.select:
SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evaluation_id, qe.score AS raw_score FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'CONFIRMED') AND qe.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{evaluationPeriodId} AND qe.score IS NOT NULL
AND qe.s_qual IS NULL
ORDER BY qe.evaluatee_id, qe.evaluation_level, qe.qualitative_evaluation_id

SELECT COUNT(qe.score) AS sample_count, COALESCE(AVG(qe.score), 0) AS mean_score, COALESCE(STDDEV_SAMP(qe.score), 0) AS stddev_score FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'CONFIRMED') AND qe.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) AND qe.evaluation_period_id = #{evaluationPeriodId} AND qe.score IS NOT NULL

SELECT qe.evaluation_period_id FROM qualitative_evaluation qe WHERE qe.status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'CONFIRMED') AND qe.evaluation_level IN (1, 2) AND qe.score IS NOT NULL AND qe.s_qual IS NULL GROUP BY qe.evaluation_period_id ORDER BY MAX(COALESCE(qe.updated_at, qe.created_at)) DESC, qe.evaluation_period_id DESC LIMIT 1
